---
title: "The Hon. Alethea Elizabeth Catherine Colborne"
---

## The Hon. Alethea Elizabeth Catherine Colborne

**Dates:** (1852/3-1927)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society, cousin of CMY

### Biography

The daughter of James, 2nd Lord Seaton and the Hon. Charlotte de Burgh (d. 1863) she was granddaughter of FMY's stepbrother Field-Marshal Lord Seaton.  She was a Gosling as ‘Bluebell’ from 1870. [PB 1914, wills index]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 1st [1872]
- Letter from [10 July 1870]
- Letter from May 31 st [1870] 
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
